No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university master's course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops technical and transferable skills for employment (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops skills in software analysis and testing, contributing to technological upgrading and innovation, and enhancing economic productivity (Target 8.2) and management innovation (Core Competence A).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course focuses on building reliable and secure software systems, which are fundamental for developing quality, resilient digital infrastructure and enhancing technological capabilities and innovation (Targets 9.1, 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on identifying and mitigating 'security vulnerabilities' and 'breaches' in software directly contributes to combating cybercrime and strengthening the reliability of institutions (Targets 16.4, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The emphasis on 'utilizing large, open-source tools effectively' promotes knowledge sharing and the use of enabling technology, aligning with Targets 17.6 and 17.8.
